scripts.dev: cross-env BROWSER=chrome vite build && cross-env BROWSER=chrome vite build --config vite.content.config.js
scripts.build: cross-env BROWSER=chrome vite build && cross-env BROWSER=chrome vite build --config vite.content.config.js
scripts.build:chrome: cross-env BROWSER=chrome vite build && cross-env BROWSER=chrome vite build --config vite.content.config.js
scripts.build:firefox: cross-env BROWSER=firefox vite build && cross-env BROWSER=firefox vite build --config vite.content.config.js
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:xpi
